title: Geocluster
description: Terrafirmacraft-Style ore generation and geological systems
body:
Geocluster is inspired by the discontinued forge mod: Geolosys, this version is for Fabric/Quilt and have some tweaks to the cosmetic part of the mod and also some optimization solutions to the ore generation.

 

By default, this mod disables all ore generation in minecraft and applies its own generation. all of which can be configured with datapacks identical to how Geolosys' datapacks works.
